summary: All P0 features VERIFIED WORKING. Backend (14/14 tests passed). Frontend (import.meta error FIXED, Reports page filters/tabs interactive, Settings POS tab with Offline Mode working). The metro.config.js fix with unstable_enablePackageExports = false resolved the frontend blocking error.

reports_page_period_filters.details: Today, Week, Month, Quarter, Year, Custom filters all visible and interactive. Clicking filters triggers API calls with correct date ranges.

reports_page_tabs.details: Overview, Products, Staff, Customers, Payments tabs visible and clickable. Tab switching works.

settings_page_loads.details: Settings page loads without errors. All tabs visible: General, RetailPro, Apps, POS, Locations, Plan, Referral.

settings_pos_offline_mode.details: POS tab shows Offline Mode section with: Enable toggle, description, Sync Status showing 'Online • 0 pending orders', Refresh Product Cache button.

backend_reports_api.details: API correctly accepts start_date and end_date parameters. All 14 tests passed.

import_meta_error_fix.details: metro.config.js fix with 'config.resolver.unstable_enablePackageExports = false' resolved the 'Cannot use import.meta outside a module' error that was blocking frontend.

features_tested: Auth: Admin login, Demo login, Invalid credentials
Reports API: Default params, start/end dates, single day, week, month, quarter, year periods

frontend_tests.reports_page: WORKING - Page loads, KPIs displayed, charts rendered
frontend_tests.settings_pos_tab: WORKING - Offline Mode section visible with toggle and sync status

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features working: 1) Reports page filters and tabs are fully interactive, 2) Settings POS tab shows Offline Mode section, 3) Backend APIs work correctly. The import.meta error was fixed by adding unstable_enablePackageExports = false to metro.config.js.
